name: National Mission on Edible Oils- Oil Palm
benefit_description: The scheme targets to provide following benefits: 1)	Enhance production and productivity of oilpalm 2)	Promotion and extension of improved technologies. 3)	Provision of quality planting material 4)	Support for nutrient management and pest management 5)	Provision of various components for Interventio
details: The State Department of Agriculture, State Department of Horticulture, Central University, ICAR Institutions, CDDs, SAUs, KVKs, Central Agencies/Cooperatives, Oil palm processors/ Associations, DD Kisan, etc. will be the implementing stake holders of the NMEO-Oil palm. The Department of Agriculture/Horticulture of the State Governments will be the Nodal agency for undertaking area expansion programme of Oil Palm in their States with close partnership with Processors. The processors are also elig
eligibility_text: Anyone is eligible to apply under the scheme.
